{T} : Roll a die, then spend any number of my Luck counters to increase the result by that much. On a:  • 4+: You may target a Character in your Expeditions. It activates its {D} ability.  • 1-3: I gain 1 Luck counter.
{H} I gain [[Fleeting]] unless a {D} ability was activated this turn.  {H} [Resupply].
{J} If a card in your Expeditions or your Reserve has a {D} ability, I gain 1 boost[]. (A boost is a +1/+1/+1 counter. Remove it when it leaves the Expedition zone.)
{H} Starting with you, each player discards their Reserve, [Resupplies], then [Resupplies] again.
elements.ECHO_EFFECT: {D} : Create an [Aerolith] token in target player's Landmarks. (Discard me from Reserve to do this.)

elements.MAIN_EFFECT: {J} I gain [[Anchored]].  {H} Send to Reserve each other Character with {V} less than or equal to mine.

{T} : Draw a card, then discard a card from your hand. You can only activate this if you are first player.  As soon as six cards or more are in your discard pile, I permanently gain:  "When you discard a card from your hand — Return it to your Reserve."
{H} I gain [[Fleeting]] unless six or more cards are in your discard pile.  {H} [Sabotage]. (Discard up to one target card from a Reserve.)
{H} If six or more cards are in your discard pile, create a [Mana Moth 2/2/2] Illusion token in target Expedition.
{J} Discard target Character with Base Cost {3} or less.  When you pass after your opponents — If you are first player, complete me.
